evidence_summary: LMD quarantine manifest includes three filenames: /var/www/html/media/wysiwyg/img/x.php, /var/www/html/pub/static/.htaccess.bak, and /tmp/.ICE-unix/sess_abc123. Each file has a SHA256 in the manifest. Operator asks for IOC normalization of paths and hashes, with mtime clustering context from find output.
